sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أُخْتِي أَنْ تَبْدَأَ مَشْرُوعَهَا الصَّغِيرَ الْخَاصَّ.
sentences.translation: Moja sestra je odlučila da započne svoj mali privatni projekat.
sentences.translationEn: My sister decided to start her own small private project.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ مَتْجَرًا لِبَيْعِ الْمَلَابِسِ الْمَصْنُوعَةِ يَدَوِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Otvorila je prodavnicu za prodaju ručno rađene odjeće.
sentences.translationEn: She opened a shop for selling handmade clothes.

sentences.arabic: تَدِيرُ وَقْتَهَا بِشَكْلٍ جَيِّدٍ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dobro upravlja svojim vremenom između posla i porodice.
sentences.translationEn: She manages her time well between work and family.

sentences.translation: Uspjeh zahtijeva strpljenje i kontinuiran trud.
sentences.translationEn: Success requires patience and continuous effort.
